basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Associate Professor, Junior Physiotherapist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: The Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has officially announced the Associate Professor (Physiotherapy) / Junior Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 04 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 45 years and hold qualifications such as Master’s in Physiotherapy (M.P.T./M.P.Th./M.Sc. P.T), Ph.D. in Physiotherapy, 10+2 (Medical), and Bachelor’s degree in Physiotherapy (BPT) can now submit their online applications from 04 May 2026 to 24 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification a

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/BC: 5 years, Physically Handicapped: 10 years, Ex-servicemen: as per Punjab Govt. Rules

qualification.education_qualification: Master's in Physiotherapy (M.P.T./M.P.Th./M.Sc. P.T), Ph.D. in Physiotherapy, 10+2 (Medical), Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy (BPT),
qualification.details: Associate Professor (Physiotherapy): Master's in Physiotherapy (M.P.T./M.P.Th./M.Sc. P.T) with five years total experience as Assistant Professor (out of which minimum 2 years as Senior AP Preferably). Ph.D. in any discipline in Physiotherapy recognized by U.G.C. (Essential 05 Publications (in Total)). Qualification eligibility criteria as per NCAHP. Junior Physiotherapist: 10+2 (Medical) from a recognized Board/Institution/University. Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy (BPT) from a recognized University/Institution as a full-time Regular Candidate. Qualification as per University Rules. General: Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BFUHS recruitment is 24 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Associate Professor (Physiotherapy) and Junior Physiotherapist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: For Junior Physiotherapist, candidates need 10+2 (Medical) and a Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy (BPT).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 2360/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/BC candidates are eligible for 5 years of age relaxation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 29200/- to Rs. 67700/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official BFUHS website by filling out the application form and paying the fee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an interview.
